description: Create a character 'Pose Sheet' for the walk cycle animation using the scene at /home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz. The pose sheet must show frames 1, 4, and 7 side-by-side horizontally without overlapping on a single stage. Render the final composite at 1920x1080 resolution to /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/pose_sheet/poses.png.
